query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contracts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  clientId INT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ativo',
  valorTotal DECIMAL(10,2),
  pdfUrl TEXT,
  criadoEm TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  encerradoEm TIMESTAMP NULL,
  deletedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notes TEXT
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uiJuwepBaepVjU.root --database 9oQjN6PX9fNMedgfErUfQE --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contracts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  clientId INT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ativo',
  valorTotal DECIMAL(10,2),
  pdfUrl TEXT,
  criadoEm TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  encerradoEm TIMESTAMP NULL,
  deletedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notes TEXT
);
